text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash was gifted some tickets to an
amusement park, so the two of us decide to visit
it after a day out.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Amusement parks look so different in the
evening. The attractions are a magical sight to
behold, illuminated in neon lights...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes. I think we'll have fun here.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However, we have limited time, so let's follow this
timetable I made and visit each attraction in
order. I made it as detailed as possible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first thing on Eishin Flash's schedule is a roller
coaster.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
At this pace, we shall reach maximum altitude in
precisely seven seconds. Then we shall plummet
at an incredible velocity.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Five, four, three, two...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh—zero!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We go on all sorts of rides after that.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There, that's it for the spinning teacups and Ferris
wheel. Next is the tower drop ride—
choice_data_list: What about the haunted house over there?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...That is not on the schedule.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Because there may be... zombies.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, we have a great time while following her
timetable.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Now, shall we look around the gift shop? I must
buy a souvenir for Falcon.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there's the store. Let's make our purchases by
7:20 p.m. and leave the premises by 7:30 p.m.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With these times in mind, we head to the shop.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Oh... They are hosting a German fair.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We had no idea there was an event going on, but
it seems the gift shop and kiosks are selling things
from Germany today.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Ah... They have Donauwelle.
choice_data_list: Is it a German pastry too?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. "Welle" means "wave," as in the waves of
water... Do you see how the chocolate appears
like small waves?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's very good. I recommend it. Though, as the
daughter of patissiers, I may need to check the
taste for authenticity...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Could those be Streuselkuchen and
Lebkuchen?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Wow... They have such variety, and nothing
appears factory-made. Perhaps these were all
handmade by true meisters...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I happen to catch a glimpse of my watch. It's
already 7:20 p.m.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Oh! Have a look! This is called a Hummel doll.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There's one inside my parent's shop too. It's been
there since I was a child.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It was a little girl doll with a baby sheep. We kept
it on the shelf directly to the left of the entrance.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Ahh... What fond memories. I was once scolded
for playing with that doll when I was quite
young... Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I never imagined I would be given an opportunity to recall my homeland on a day like today. How—

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hm? That sound...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Oh no! What's the time?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My most sincere apologies! I've ruined our
schedule because of my mindless daydreaming!
choice_data_list: It's okay. That's the right thing to do today.
It's okay. That's the right thing to do today.

Since we're here, why don't we look around
some more?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My most sincere apologies! I've ruined our
schedule because of my mindless daydreaming!
choice_data_list: It's okay. That's the right thing to do today.
It's okay. That's the right thing to do today.

Since we're here, why don't we look around
some more?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Well... yes. Reliving moments of my childhood has
been quite fun.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But to become so lost in thought as to derail our
schedule... I still have much to learn about being
disciplined...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I've made up my mind. Moving forward, I shall
include more leeway into my timetables.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, it won't be an issue even if I have so
much fun that I lose track of time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I want to enjoy myself to the fullest when I get a
chance like this again.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
We mustn't! If we do, the schedule will be in
complete ruins!
choice_data_list:
But isn't it nice to be here? Think of this as a
happy accident.

But isn't it nice to be here? Think of this as a
happy accident.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: A happy accident?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I suppose it is important for schedules to be fluid
in order to accommodate unexpected
circumstances and accidents, happy or not...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Very well. I'll adjust the timetable so we can take
our time browsing for souvenirs.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'll take this moment to lose myself in memories of
home.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Eishin Flash and I go home with our
arms full of souvenirs.
